scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,frontend -c cyan,magenta "cd api && bun run dev"      "cd frontend && bun run dev"
scripts.dev:test: concurrently -n api,frontend -c cyan,magenta "cd api && bun run dev:test" "cd frontend && bun run dev"
scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && bun run --filter '*' typecheck
scripts.test: concurrently -n api,frontend -c cyan,magenta "bun run test:api" "bun run test:frontend"
